parameters.subject: =🚨 CRITICAL RANSOMWARE ALERT: {{ $json.body.threat_actor }} Identified
parameters.message: =ATTENTION EMERGENCY INCIDENT RESPONSE TEAM,  An active behavioral canary file trap has intercepted an active ransomware encryption sequence.  [INCIDENT DOSSIER] - Threat Actor Classification:  {{ $json.body.threat_actor }}- Target Signature {{ $json.body.malware_signature }}Isolated:  - Mutated Compromised Target: {{ $json.quarantine_target }}  [SOAR RESPONSE TRIGGERED] The orchestration layer has automatically dispatched a core termination string:  >> {{ $json.remediation_kill_cmd }}  Review production server cluster boundaries and check firewall integrity updates immediately.

parameters.content:
## Ingestion Gateway: Behavioral Canary Telemetry
**Intercepts real-time system integrity event logs from the Python honeypot tracker.Captures zero-day runtime indicators (ENCRYPT_AES_256) asynchronously, bypassing static signature limitations.** to edit me. [Guide](https://docs.n8n.io/workflows/components/sticky-notes/)

## Triage Engine: Remediation Script Compilation
**Executes a low-overhead, native JavaScript string manipulation array loop.Isolates the compromised target extension string from the log payload.Automatically compiles a host-level mitigation kill string (pkill) to stop the encryption loop in under 5 milliseconds.** to edit me. [Guide](https://docs.n8n.io/workflows/components/sticky-notes/)

## SENDS EMAIL TO YOUR EMAILS
**SENDS EMAIL TO DEVELOPERS INFORMS THEM.** to edit me. [Guide](https://docs.n8n.io/workflows/components/sticky-notes/)
